docket_entries.description: REMARK: THIS CASE HAS BEEN DESIGNATED COMPLEX AND IS NOW AN ADD-ON CASE TO JUDICIAL COUNCIL COORDINATION PROCEEDING NO. 5061 (IN RE LYFT RIDESHARE CASES) PURSUANT TO THE ORDER FILED ON MAR-18-2026 IN CASE NO. CJC-20-005061. (613)
